reason: Usability fix, not a redesign: the saved-text-name setting now offers its ${name} tokens as clickable chips (like the rules editor) so users insert ${slug}/${date}/… with a click instead of mistyping the ${...} syntax. The UI diff only replaces the static token hint under the existing text box with a WrapPanel of small Border+TextBlock chips built from the current palette, and clicking one inserts the token at the caret. Wheel geometry, colours, animations and the settings layout are untouched. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
